title: Compact Tools
description: Combines All Tools Into One Item
body:
# Combined Tools Mod

This mod combines all of your tools into a single item!

This will include the mining power of the "pickaxe, axe, shovel, hoe, and some aspects of the sword and shear". But will not keep any tool specific properties (like shearing sheep, making paths, and cultivating farmland). Keep in mind that the tool has the same durability of its respective tier, it's not increased.

The items are made up of the same tiers that all vanilla tools have (wood, stone, copper, iron, gold, diamond, and netherite).

![Tool Lineup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4660b6c93ea689bf33f330808a9963f67ee972df_0.webp)

# Crafting

The crafting recipe is a stick surrounded by the material to make the tool. Except for netherite, which is crafted by using a smithing table.

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5d2a301cc6acd1ebeee0bc64bbe52f067cf8f69_0.webp)

![Smithing Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cd415a2b513b87638c864f7f1af89890310604c_0.webp)

# Enchanting

The mod also supports enchanting (anything a pickaxe can be enchanted with) and works well with other mods!

![Enchanting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26fca391c811edb9fe5b2745f25cf84702018cdf_0.webp)

# Discord

Join the discord: [Link](https://discord.gg/zHzFgWX8KW)
